ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-11-2006 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL WAS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36 (A). THE CASE IS SEVERED FROM BRAYTON GROUP 356. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 7/31/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 7/21/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT STIPULATED TO. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 6/9/06, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. PLAINTIFF WILL SERVE, BY FAX, AN ECONOMIC REPORT AND/OR OFFER THEIR EXPERT ECONOMIST FOR DEPOSITION NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: VERA MU/JIROQUE; REPORTER: RITA HOWELL #2542 (206)

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-07-2011 Continued To Jan-25-11 At 11:45 A.M. In Dept 606
MINI MINUTES: NOAH J. WOODS, Esq. appearing on behalf of the plaintiff(s). On the record, counsel indicates to the Court that the dismissal for the last remaining defendant, Kaiser Ventures, will be filed within the next two weeks. Matter is continued to Tuesday, January 25, 2011 at 11:45am in Dept. 606. Counsel is instructed to lodge copy of dismissal to D606 prior to the continued hearing date. Upon receipt of the copy, 1/25/11 hearing will be vacated. Judge Tomar Mason, Clerk M. Pena, Reporter Doucette #5963 (D606).

Off Calendar Sep-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
JEREMY D. HUIE, ESQ. (BASSI MARTINI EDLIN & BLUM), (415)397-9006, FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, KAISER VENTURES LLC
JEFFREY WEHR, ESQ. (BRAYTON PURCELL, LLP), (415)898-1555

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT KAISER VENTURES LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHIFTED THE BURDEN BECAUSE IT HAS NOT PROVED THAT PLAINTIFF CANNOT SHOW THAT DEFENDANT IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE OREGON SHIPYARD. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB/BD)
